note: Fresh surface: Graphiti community layer + Cognee retriever zoo. Community candidates gated on iter-6 memory-ID-vs-entity-node reframe; Cognee retrievers are reframe-light.

claim: Label-propagation over entity RELATES_TO edges clusters entities into communities; LLM pairwise-reduce writes a CommunityNode (summary+name); communities become first-class searchable nodes. GATED on entity-node reframe (internal graph is memory-ID).
maps_to: adaptive-fusion (new community channel) + causal-graph community summarization (needs entity nodes first)

claim: Community summaries via tournament-style pairwise LLM reduction (merge in parallel pairs until one remains) -> compressed community-level abstraction. No internal summarize-on-cluster exists.
maps_to: memory_save content-router (post-save group summary) + memory_context (community-level retrieval)

claim: EXTENDS adaptive-fusion: dedicated community search (parallel fulltext+cosine over Community nodes, RRF/MMR/cross-encoder rerank) adds a community-derived retrieval channel alongside entity edges + episodes.

Chain-of-thought retriever iteratively validates the answer + generates a follow-up question, fetching new graph triplets per round (max_iter=4), merging across rounds. Internal memory_context is single-pass.
maps_to: memory_context deep-mode (iterative query refinement) + deep-loop-runtime multi-pass

claim: Decomposes a complex query into focused subqueries (structured LLM output), retrieves triplets per subquery in parallel, merges+dedups, then combines context or answers each subquery before synthesizing. Internal search has no decomposition stage.

EXTENDS intent: BEAMRouter classifies into 10 question types and routes each to an optimal retriever + type-specific prompt. Internal memory_context has intent=auto but does NOT select different retrieval strategies per type.

Extracts time intervals from NL queries (structured QueryInterval), filters graph events by timestamp range, then vector-ranks filtered events; falls back to triplet search when no bounds found. Internal search has no time-interval extraction. HIGH cross-fit with C3-x currentness.
maps_to: memory_search (temporal filter channel) + memory_context (time-aware mode); reconcile vs C3-x

claim: EXTENDS banked CG-iterative-context-extension: concrete impl using the generated completion as the next search query, merging with convergence detection (stop when no new triplets / max rounds). Adds the convergence-stop + completion-as-query idiom.
